that a physician must get the plan’s approval in advance before 
prescribing the drug. The value of this field may not exactly represent the beneficiary experience at 
the time of the prescription fill (e.g., no data are collected at the time of the transaction to indicate 
the actual beneficiary experience). For 2006–2009 this variable was found in the Event Characteristics 
files (BP_UM_TIER_YYYY_MM). This variable is first available in the Formulary file in 2010.
